description: This file defines a LocalPersistence class that manages storing and retrieving favorite recipe IDs and custom recipes as JSON strings using SharedPreferences in a Flutter/Dart project.

classes.name: LocalPersistence
classes.description: A class providing methods to persist favorite recipe IDs and custom recipes locally using shared preferences.

methods.name: loadFavoriteIds
methods.description: Retrieves favorite recipe IDs from shared preferences, returning a set of strings.

methods.name: saveFavoriteIds
methods.description: Saves a set of favorite recipe IDs to shared preferences.

methods.name: loadCustomRecipeJsonList
methods.description: Loads custom recipes stored as a list of raw JSON strings from shared preferences.

methods.name: saveCustomRecipeJsonList
methods.description: Saves a list of custom recipes as raw JSON strings to shared preferences.

methods.name: normalizeJson
methods.description: Converts raw JSON string into a normalized JSON string with stable formatting.
